title: 109. Nålen i kosmos och passiva inkomster
summary_md:
# 109. Nålen i kosmos och passiva inkomster

**Feed**: borssurr  
**Published**: 2026-06-26  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

A wide-ranging Swedish EFN/Börssurr market chat. Main threads: renewed AI hype (Malmö-founded AnySphere/Cursor, Micron's blowout AI-chip results), the oil-price drop and its rate/inflation crosscurrents, the Castellum→Wihlborgs property deal struck at a 4% discount, a weak H&M report, fading defense stocks (Rheinmetall, Saab), and Bessembinder's research arguing index/'own-the-haystack' investing beats stock-picking. The hosts close with a 21-year-old's speculative space-stock tip list.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 CAST — Castellum | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Sold properties at only 4% discount vs 23% share discount, confirming NAV; distributes 60% of proceeds; host says go-to property stock to look at.

#### Reasoning

Host explicitly says the company is going 'from strength to strength' under tough conditions and that if you want to own one property stock, this could be the one. The 4% transaction discount vs a 23% market discount signals the share price is too pessimistic; cash inflow plus 60% distribution support the case.

#### Sell Triggers

- if property valuations roll over again
- if the 23% NAV discount fails to narrow
- if disposals erode earnings power

> *"Det här är ju en aktie som jag tycker om bolaget verkar gå från klarhet till klarhet under tuffa omständigheter. ... ska man äga en fastighetsaktie kan det här nog vara en att titta på."*

---

### 🟠 WIHL — Wihlborgs | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Buying Castellum's Skåne portfolio at 4% discount; CEO guides rising FFO/share from 2027 with operating synergies, possibly funded by a rights issue.

#### Reasoning

Hosts view the deal favorably: Wihlborgs is strong in Skåne so there are synergies, and management guides accretive FFO per share from 2027 even after a potential equity raise. Positive but presented as a well-run buyer rather than an outright call, hence watch.

#### Sell Triggers

- if a dilutive rights issue is priced poorly
- if FFO/share accretion fails to materialize by 2027
- if Skåne synergies disappoint

> *"Förvaltningsresultatet per aktie kommer att öka redan 2027. ... Även efter en potentiell nyemission."*

---

### 🟢 MU — Micron Technology | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Blowout AI-chip demand, very strong sales and profit, stock surged afterhours; memory prices rising sharply, seen as real growth not hype.

#### Reasoning

Hosts highlight extremely strong report driven by AI-chip demand, with a cited investor urging 'look at the Micron report, what growth.' They note it's real earnings, not just air. Tempered by their own question of whether it is sustainable or an AI bubble, so moderate conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI capex spending slows
- if the memory-price spike reverses
- if AI-bubble fears trigger a derating

> *"Micron levererar jättestark försäljning och vinst. Jättemycket efterfrågan på AI-chips ... Ta en titt på Micron-rapporten. Snacka om tillväxt."*

---

### ⛔ HM-B — H&M | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Weak report, perceived as cost-cutting its way to success while rival Inditex/Zara pulls ahead; stock down on results.

#### Reasoning

Hosts characterize H&M's report as poor and the strategy as 'saving its way to success,' contrasting it unfavorably with Inditex/Zara which started the year weak but has recently outperformed H&M. Low conviction, more impression than deep analysis.

#### Sell Triggers

- if margins improve via the cost program
- if sales growth re-accelerates vs Inditex
- if a strong subsequent quarter surprises

> *"H&M kommit med en ganska dålig rapport. ... bolaget ska fortsätta spara sig till framgång. ... [Inditex/Zara] har spruttat ifrån H&M ganska rejält."*

---

### ⛔ SAAB-B — Saab | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Underperforming as market rotates from defense to AI; Colombia's incoming Trump-aligned govt (Gripen buyer) may favor US jets instead.

#### Reasoning

Hosts note defense stocks are losing momentum as the theme rotates to AI, and Saab is not doing well. They flag a specific risk: Colombia's incoming right-wing, Trump-friendly government could prefer American fighters over the Gripen, potentially bad news, though unsure old contracts can be reopened.

#### Sell Triggers

- if defense-theme momentum returns
- if the Colombia Gripen contract is firmly honored
- if order intake stays strong

> *"Saab går inte heller så bra. När trenden har gått från försvar till AI så orkar man inte med försvarsaktierna längre. ... undrar om det här kan vara ett dåligt besked för Saab."*

---

### 🟠 RKLB — Rocket Lab | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 30%

Part of a 21-year-old's speculative 'winner space stocks' list read out by the host; launches small and large rockets from multiple sites.

#### Reasoning

Presented purely as one of seven space tips compiled by a 21-year-old the host met on Gotland, framed as a niche/thematic idea worth looking closer at rather than a researched recommendation. Highly speculative, hence weak/low confidence watch.

#### Sell Triggers

- if space-theme enthusiasm fades
- if launch cadence or contracts disappoint

> *"Rocket Lab, Long Beach, Kalifornien. ... Skjuter upp små och stora raketer för företag och privatpersoner."*

---

### 🟠 PL — Planet Labs | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 30%

On the speculative space tip list; San Francisco Earth-observation firm with the largest satellite fleet selling daily imagery to govt, defense and agriculture.

#### Reasoning

One of seven thematic space picks from a 21-year-old, read out as ideas 'worth looking closer at,' not host-researched calls. Speculative niche bet on a rising space theme; low confidence watch.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the space/imagery theme cools
- if government/defense demand softens

> *"Planet Labs i San Francisco. jordobservationssatelliter i hela världen. Flest sådana har de."*

---

### 🟠 STM — STMicroelectronics | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 30%

On the speculative space tip list; Geneva-based, Nasdaq-listed, supplies radio-frequency chips to SpaceX.

#### Reasoning

Included among the 21-year-old's seven space ideas as a SpaceX supplier; presented as a thematic, speculative pick rather than a researched recommendation. Low conviction watch.

#### Sell Triggers

- if space/RF demand disappoints
- if SpaceX supplier relationship weakens

> *"ST Microelectronics. Bolag med säte i Genev. Noterat på Nasdaq. Radiofrekvensschips till SpaceX."*

---

### 🟠 OVZON — Ovzon | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 30%

Swedish satellite-communications name included in the 21-year-old's speculative space-stock tip list.

#### Reasoning

Named only as one of the thematic space picks ('needle in the cosmos'), with no host analysis beyond inclusion. Purely speculative theme exposure, hence weak/low confidence watch.

#### Sell Triggers

- if space-theme momentum fades
- if Ovzon's contract pipeline disappoints

> *"Svenska Ovzon och förstås amerikanska jätten SpaceX. En rymd aktielista för den som vill leta nålen i kosmos."*

---
